reviews.review_description: Great experience with the app! You can create interactive experiences pretty easily and visuals are nice!

Update - Been meaning to revisit thanks to the developers quick response and finally have gotten to. With that clarification, it was easy to get through the tutorial. I need to go through a lot more tutorials before i’m fully proficient with this, but it definitely is great for making basic stuff even with limited knowledge and even with being easily confused like me lol. It has the ability to import your own stuff. To the developers, thank you for your fast response and clarification. 

So this seems like a great app if you can figure out how to use it. Unfortunately, the tutorial has at least one fatal flaw, at least for me. It walks you through and it seems like it’s all going well, and then it tells you to open particles under collections. Except there is no particles under collections. 

Googling wasn’t much help, but from what I can tell, the issue may be that particles are only provided for paid users. If that’s correct, that makes the tutorial useless imo. I’m not going to go premium without knowing if I can use it. 

Or, maybe it’s a bug and it’s supposed to be there. I don’t know,. The little I was able to figure out makes it seem like a really cool tool. Needless to say, I’m disappointed I can’t get through the tutorial.
teleport is so uncomfortable. and also need fly

The ability to craft immersive experiences on-the-go is a game-changer. With its intuitive no-code platform, creating interactive environments has never been this accessible. From collaborative spaces and remote classrooms to engaging training scenarios, StellarX opens up a world of possibilities. I'm particularly impressed with the real-time multi-user collaboration feature across various devices, making it a versatile choice for both VR enthusiasts and professionals alike. The spatial Canvas with its user-friendly creation tools, along with a plethora of provided assets, makes the entire experience seamless. Kudos to the team behind this revolutionary app. Highly recommended for anyone looking to dive deep into the world of virtual collaboration and creation!

I am currently looking for an alternative to VRChat, more in the direction of SecondLife (creative possibilities, inventory, interactivity) and further away from VRChat (everything has to be designed and developed in the Unity game engine). StellarX has made the most promising impression so far. But unfortunately only until you have completed the tutorial and are confronted with the fact that these are not open virtual worlds that you can browse through and visit (inside of StellarX), only virtual (even if very large) rooms that have an invitation code which you can sharewith others outside of StellarX to meet or collaborate inside of them.

What is clearly missing here is a browser that displays public rooms, description, age classification and number of active participants. Otherwise, the expansion of the interactive possibilities or possibly a simplified mesh editor with texture upload and thanks to the price (storage) model, more could clearly be made out of this concept.

The avatars could also be worked on in the future, possibly giving them their own style and equipping them with an inventory for small games and tools that users make themselves, but this is not a major priority. The worlds that can already be created interactively are reason enough to continue working with StellarX.

I'll definitely keep an eye on StellarX. As soon as an internal browser for public spaces comes into play, the thing is likely to skyrocket quickly.

reviews.review_title: New to StellarX... I can't even use it.
reviews.review_description:
I've made sure everything had been updated, and I went through the tutorial and even watched videos online. For some reason the left hand doesn't display the commands, rendering the game useless. All I can do is walk and teleport. Unable to grab or move anything, the wristwatches don't work and despite my hours of troublesshooting and research, nothing works. It's a huge disappointment because I was REALLY looking forward to using this app. Will change rating if I can ever get it working.

Update: I was able to get this working after the recent update. Uninstalling and reinstalling didn't work, but now that it's working I'm excited to see what it can do. Changed my Review from 1 to 4 stars.

developer_response.body: Cool! We are happy to know that it worked! Thanks to have updated the review too, that is really appreciated. If it's possible for you to also update the title of the review, that would be really cool too, if not, no worries. If you have questions, suggestions or even a wish list for features and improvements, you can always contact us at support@stellarx.ai and will be happy to follow up!

reviews.review_description: And by sky I mean my own creativity. Stellarx allows me to create as many different environment as I can think about. An object I want is not in the given objects? A little trip on the internet and I can add it to a space! This is the best VR creation tool I've used since getting my headset and I don't see anyone outdoing StellarX for a while!

It takes some getting used to learning everything, there’s no tutorial right out of the box that I saw,  but with some tinkering, you can figure things out. You have a number of things you can put in your world. Campfires, rain, smoke, shapes, etc. I haven’t ported my own stuff in, but I am happy tinkering with what’s in the package already. So far it’s a simple sandbox game that tinkerers will enjoy.

I am now trying to build a new project with my government to support all people from all over the world, to experience our visit in Saudi Arabia before the real coming and see the strong developments and what will happen in our future and happy today to tell all people that we welcome them and very happy with this very easy program to develop communities 🇸🇦
Unable to have others join your space.   Guess you have to pay the $14.99

developer_response.body: Hi! We are very sorry to hear about your disappointment. However, you will be happy to know that we are currently working to give all users access to the cloud upload (space transfer) feature, so that everyone will be able to enjoy creating and uploading spaces for others to join. That update is planned to be released in a few weeks. Stay tuned! In the meantime, free users can join spaces in both multi-create and multi-play modes as long as you send them the code. A subscription is required only for uploading a space to cloud, downloading and joining a space is free.

reviews.review_description: StellarX is definitely an easy-to-use tool that allow anyone to create easily without code immersive experiences!

Honestly such a good app! I love the concept of being able to use an engine and program in it to create my world. It is easy and simple to understand, even if you don't have prior experience. I think this app has a lot of potential with how easy it is to create scenarios and I can't wait to see what's coming in the future!

I am new to this app. I thought you had more creativity. I was trying to find a way to color things for ages and I couldn't find a thing. There is no tutorial so it is really hard to understand what everything does. Not what I wanted. But if you are looking for an app that lets you create things easily and big things in seconds this is the app for you. Thanks for the experience but please improve.

developer_response.body: Hello! Thank you for your honest feedback. We are sorry to hear that our app did not fit your needs. You will be happy to know that we indeed have a material authoring tool planned on our roadmap which will allow you to edit color settings and such, but we do not have a date yet. Also, we do have an in-app tutorial currently accessible within the Basecamp and you should be prompted to launch the tutorial the first time you launch the app. If you have not been prompted at all on first launch, then there might be a bug. If you want, you can contact us at support@stellarx.ai and we will be happy to help you!

reviews.review_description: I was really excited for this app but after logging in, I can't get past the preparing assets screen. It is taking forever and nothing happens. Would really appreciate some help from the devs!

developer_response.body: Hello! That is very unfortunate. We tested the app on different accounts on both Quest 2 and Pro and everything seems to work fine. Maybe you can make sure that your Quest device is up to date with the latest OS version and reboot your headset and relaunch the app. At the login screen, have you logged in with your StellarX account info or just clicked on Continue with Meta account button? It should work both ways, but try Continue with meta account if you have not done it already. Otherwise please reach out to us at support@ova.ai and we will be happy to help you.

reviews.review_description:
Feels like Christmas morning when I got a new lego set... awesome!

As someone with a background in music and engineering, this suite of tools pulls everything together - and I can share my creations with others and experience them together! Very nice.
Looks amazing, better than others but, without full tutorials, you can spend hours trying to figure it out  how to accomplish simply stuff with limited results.

developer_response.body:
Hi!

Thank you for your comment! Tutorials are available and can be accessed from the Basecamp by clicking the "Launch tutorials" button on the upper left section on the main menu. However, we are aware that it needs to be improved for first time users and your comment just confirmed that. We will make sure to include the improvement in the next update! In the meantime, if you have suggestions or feature requests, we are always open to learn more from you. You can submit a request here https://help.ova.ai/hc/en-us/requests/new.

Thank you!

reviews.review_description: StellarX is an absolute game-changer for anyone looking to create immersive virtual reality experiences without diving into complex coding. With its intuitive interface and robust features, building virtual worlds has never been easier.

This is a really cool app, if you’ve ever wanted to make a game but just don’t have the knowledge to do it then this is pretty close. It satisfied my coding dream, but it is a little hard to understand at the start. But you get used to it pretty quickly. It’s a ton of fun figuring out to make something and then it works perfectly. Seeing my ideas come to life is great. The best part is it’s free.
Love how you guys set up a way for us to be creative for free 💪
ITS THE MOST BEAUTIFUL THING IVE EVER SEEN IN MY LIFE ITS A SANDABOX GAME INSIDE OF A VR IVE BEEN LOOKING SO LONG I finally found it… NOW WHOS GONNA STOP ME
